Metadata.title: Coral Enterprises | Lux Renovations & Custom Kitchens
Metadata.description: Expert total home renovations in Belgium. Specializing in luxury kitchens, wellness bathrooms, and bespoke interior design.

kitchen.title: Kitchen Design
kitchen.subtitle: Culinary Excellence
kitchen.description: Bespoke culinary spaces meticulously crafted for elite living.
kitchen.fullDescription:
Our Kitchen Design service is dedicated to creating bespoke culinary spaces that are not only visually stunning but also highly functional.

We believe the kitchen is the heart of the home, a place where memories are made and culinary masterpieces are born.

Our process begins with understanding your unique lifestyle and cooking habits. Whether you're a professional chef needing industrial-grade appliances and workflow, or a family needing a durable, welcoming space for breakfast and homework, we tailor every detail to you.

bath.title: Bath Restoration
bath.subtitle: Personal Sanctuaries
bath.description: Transform your daily ritual into a restorative spa experience.
bath.fullDescription:
Transform your daily routine into a luxurious spa experience with our Bath Restoration service. We turn ordinary bathrooms into private sanctuaries of relaxation and rejuvenation.

From master en-suites to guest powder rooms, we bring an element of refined elegance to every wet area. Our designs focus on tranquility, using calming palettes, natural materials, and advanced fixtures.

additions.title: Custom Additions
additions.subtitle: Expand Your Horizons
additions.description: Seamless home extensions that blend perfectly.
additions.fullDescription:
Our Custom Additions service allows you to expand your living space without compromising the architectural integrity of your home. We specialize in seamless extensions that look and feel like they were always part of the original structure.

Whether you need a new master suite, a sunroom, a home office, or an expanded entertainment area, we manage the entire process from architectural planning to the final coat of paint.

wholeHome.title: Whole Home
wholeHome.subtitle: Complete Transformation
wholeHome.description: Reimagine your entire living space from the ground up.
wholeHome.fullDescription:
For those seeking a complete reinvention of their living environment, our Whole Home Renovation service offers a comprehensive solution. This is for the homeowner who loves their location but needs a home that better reflects their current taste and lifestyle.

We strip back the layers and reimagine the flow, function, and aesthetic of your entire property. This is a holistic approach ensuring consistent design language throughout every room.

Hero.title: Luxury. Redefined.
Hero.subtitle: Aligned. Bespoke. Professional.
Hero.description: Experience the ultimate in home transformation with our premium kitchen and bath remodeling services.

kitchenLoft.title: Patrician House Kitchen
kitchenLoft.caption1: Primary view of the fully renovated open-concept kitchen.
kitchenLoft.caption2: Secondary perspective showing the custom marble island and integrated appliances.
kitchenLoft.captionBefore: The original outdated 90s kitchen before the full luxury transformation.

masterBath.title: Zoute Wellness Bathroom
masterBath.caption1: The main spa area featuring a freestanding tub and panoramic views.
masterBath.caption2: A view of the rainfall shower with frameless glass and natural stone.
masterBath.captionBefore: The original cramped bathroom with dated blue tiles and limited space.

contemporaryKitchen.title: Beguinage Chef's Kitchen
contemporaryKitchen.caption1: Professional grade chef's kitchen tailored for home excellence.
contemporaryKitchen.caption2: Detailed view of the integrated wine storage and custom coffee station.
contemporaryKitchen.captionBefore: The basic, uninspired kitchen before being reimagined for a gourmand.

masterSuite.title: Manor House Suite
masterSuite.caption1: The completed spa-inspired wet room in the master suite.
masterSuite.caption2: Alternative view showcasing the freestanding tub and natural wood accents.
masterSuite.captionBefore: The original unused, dusty attic space before its conversion into a luxury suite.

header.title: Admin Dashboard

pages.salesInvoicesDesc: Manage accounts receivable, track payments, and generate PDF invoices.
pages.noInvoicesDesc: Create your first invoice to get started with invoicing.

settings.documentLanguageDesc: Sets the default output language for generated PDFs (Estimates, Invoices). If left empty, falls back to the client's language preference or French.
settings.documentNumberingDesc: Configure the automatic numbering pattern for invoices and quotations. Changes apply to newly created documents only.
settings.pageSubtitle: Manage global business details and Peppol invoicing data.
settings.peppolDesc: Your account requires an active Peppol profile to instantly deliver B2B invoices across the European Union. Enter your VAT number below, then click "Auto-Fetch" to retrieve your company details securely.
settings.brandingDesc: Configure your brand color, upload a logo, choose a PDF layout, or upload custom stationery.

dashboard.step2Desc: Instantiate the immutable CRM systems to store your Contacts.
